messages.content: You just connected on an outbound sales call. The prospect picked up the phone. Call get_prospect_info first to learn about them, then greet them with a brief, natural opener. Remember: you called them, so don't ask how you can help.

{"name": "Marcus Johnson", "title": "Head of Data", "company": "GreenPath Logistics", "company_size": "800 employees", "industry": "Logistics and Supply Chain", "pain_points": ["Running 40 plus Airbyte pipelines that keep breaking when schemas change", "Spending 20 hours a week on pipeline maintenance instead of analysis", "CEO wants a unified dashboard but data is scattered across 6 systems"], "current_tools": "Airbyte (self-hosted), PostgreSQL, Metabase, custom Python scripts", "trigger_event": "Their lead data engineer just quit, and nobody else knows how to maintain the Airbyte setup"}
✓ Hi Marcus, this is Alex from SyncFlow. I saw that your lead data engineer just quit and wanted to check in on how the Airbyte pipelines are holding up without them. Just to confirm,
